tasks.label: Export Latest Commit Files
tasks.command: git show --name-status --pretty=format:"" --no-renames > latest-copilot-changes.txt; git show --stat --oneline -1 > latest-copilot-stat.txt; git status --short --branch

tasks.label: Convert Commit Reports UTF8
tasks.command: Get-Content latest-copilot-changes.txt -Encoding Unicode | Set-Content latest-copilot-changes-utf8.txt -Encoding utf8; Get-Content latest-copilot-stat.txt -Encoding Unicode | Set-Content latest-copilot-stat-utf8.txt -Encoding utf8
